name: stella-pi-workbench
description: A polished desktop GUI for the Pi coding agent, signed by Stella.
author: Stella

scripts.package:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --dir --publish never
scripts.package:dir:win:x64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --dir --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:dir:mac:x64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --dir --mac --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:dir:mac:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --dir --mac --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:win:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --win nsis --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never
